text_block_list.text:
As we head back, Narita Taishin and I<n>take a
shortcut through the dessert<n>section of the
station's underground<n>mall, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Geez, this place is packed. Some<n>shortcut. It's
taking way longer to get<n>through than if we just
went the<n>normal way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's get out of here—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm s-so sorry! Did I hurt you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch, no. Like that would hurt me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank goodness. I really am sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, then, I guess... I'll be going now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that your phone on the ground?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? O-oh my gosh, you're right!

Rice Shower scrambles to pick her<n>phone up, and I
catch a glance of the<n>words "Apple Dessert Fair"
on the<n>screen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'm sorry I'm<n>such a bother...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. It's no skin off—

text_block_list.name: Employee
text_block_list.text:
Get your apple cake here! This is the<n>apple of the
Apple Dessert Fair's<n>eye, and there are only ten
cakes left!<n>Grab one while you can!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Forget it. Anyway, did you come here<n>to buy that?
You just gonna leave<n>empty-handed?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, i-it's fine. I wanted to get a big<n>apple cake to
split with everyone,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I bring nothing but misfortune, and<n>I'll only
make a mess out of things!<n>There's no way I can
invite the<n>others to have cake...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

Without another word, Narita Taishin<n>walks off by
herself. Shortly later, she<n>returns with a box.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I got the last cake. I'm not one for<n>sweets, though,
so here. You can<n>have it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?! Wh-why did you get it for<n>me?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No reason. Just felt like it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: There's this thing I can't stand...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And that's when people want to do<n>something,
but don't—because they<n>think they can't.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Taishin...
choice_data_list: Hey, let's head back and have some tea together!

Hey, let's head back and invite lots of friends to
eat it with us!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Leave me out of your little tea party. I<n>just said I
don't like sweets.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually! Um, the cake's description<n>says it isn't
overly sweet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's supposed to be tart, a little<n>sweet, and
really delicious. If it's all<n>right with you, Taishin,
um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe we can have it together!<n>I'd really like
that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Damn it.

We return to school with Rice Shower<n>and enjoy
the tea and cake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you do that, Rice. I'm gonna<n>head back—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um! Would you and your friends<n>like some as
well?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-they have more apple desserts<n>that I want to
try, so I'll go buy them<n>and be right back!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please wait for me here! I'll just be a<n>second!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Hey, wait!
choice_data_list: Looks like we're having a dessert party!
Looks like we're having a dessert party!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you so happy about?<n>How'd I get roped
into this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do I even have friends to invite? Ugh!

Luckily, she's able to get Winning<n>Ticket to come,
and the tea party goes<n>off without a hitch.
